title: Apex vs Earn2Trade (2026): Same 30% Consistency Rule, Opposite Lifetime
description: Apex 4.0 vs Earn2Trade — both enforce a 30% consistency threshold. Apex applies it forever on the funded PA; Earn2Trade drops it the moment you pass. Different lock anchor, different sign-up economics, different funded state. Honest 2026 side-by-side.

og.title: Apex vs Earn2Trade (2026): Same 30% Consistency Rule, Opposite Lifetime
og.description: Same 30% threshold, opposite scope. Different lock anchor. Different sign-up economics. Different funded state. Here's how to pick between Apex 4.0 and Earn2Trade.
